nf:register.nf:name: reg_dmem_data_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of data read from data memory

nf:register.nf:name: reg_dmem_data_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of data read from data memory

nf:register.nf:name: reg_dmem_addr
nf:register.nf:description: Address to read/write in data memory (also trace read index [5:0] in trace view mode)

nf:register.nf:name: reg_imem_addr
nf:register.nf:description: Address to read in instruction memory

nf:register.nf:name: reg_pipeline_c
nf:register.nf:description: Control bits: [0] imem write enable, [1] trace enable, [2] trace clear, [3] trace freeze, [4] trace view mode

nf:register.nf:name: reg_inst_addr_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of current instruction address

nf:register.nf:name: reg_inst_addr_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of current instruction address

nf:register.nf:name: reg_wb_res_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of latest writeback result

nf:register.nf:name: reg_wb_res_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of latest writeback result

nf:register.nf:name: reg_pipeline_status
nf:register.nf:description: Status bits: trace flags/wr_ptr and core control state (see RTL packing)
